briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their AI-powered shopping app was revealed to actually be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings following the bankruptcy of middleware fintech firm Synapse, highlighting risks in embedded banking partnerships.

- **[Goodbye Visa and Mastercard: 130M Europeans switching to sovereign payment](https://www.lesnumeriques.com/banque-en-ligne/adieu-visa-et-mastercard-130-millions-d-europeens-basculent-vers-un-paiement-100-souverain-des-2026-n250918.html)** — *Hacker News* — Over 130 million Europeans are transitioning to a sovereign payment network in 2026, reducing dependence on Visa and Mastercard.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A deep-dive analysis explores how open banking frameworks are reshaping competition in the payments industry globally.

- **[Fintech is making credit cards weirder](https://workweek.com/2022/08/05/fintech-is-making-credit-cards-weirder/)** — *Hacker News* — Fintech innovation is driving increasingly unconventional credit card products with novel rewards, structures, and underwriting models.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Wealthsimple unveils new family and business products as it broadens banking push](https://betakit.com/wealthsimple-unveils-new-family-and-business-products-as-it-broadens-banking-push/)** — *BetaKit* — Wealthsimple is expanding its banking offerings to include products for kids and business accounts, deepening its push to become a full-service financial platform.

- **[Wealthsimple wants to expand its banking to kids and businesses](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/wealthsimple-launching-kids-businesses-9.7207296?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — CBC reports on Wealthsimple's ambitions to broaden its banking services beyond individual consumers to families and small businesses.

- **[Canadian angel investment falls to five-year low, but women investors gain ground](https://betakit.com/canadian-angel-investment-falls-to-five-year-low-but-women-investors-gain-ground/)** — *BetaKit* — Canadian angel investment has hit its lowest point in five years, though a silver lining emerges as women angel investors are increasingly active in the ecosystem.

- **[Hamilton ETFs Announces Plans to Launch Bitcoin DayMAX™ ETF with Filing of Preliminary Prospectus](https://financialpost.com/pmn/business-wire-news-releases-pmn/hamilton-etfs-announces-plans-to-launch-bitcoin-daymax-etf-with-filing-of-preliminary-prospectus)** — *Financial Post* — Toronto-based Hamilton ETFs has filed a preliminary prospectus with Canadian securities regulators to launch a new leveraged Bitcoin ETF product.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — *(Relevant to Canada's ongoing open banking journey)* Canada flagged screen scraping as a security risk and laid out an early open banking roadmap, a regulatory conversation that continues to shape Canada's fintech landscape today.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[What tech CEOs want from the new federal AI strategy](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/bakx-ai-strategy-federal-tech-data-9.7206174?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Canadian tech leaders are calling on the federal government to develop a clear, competitive AI strategy — a policy conversation with direct implications for Atlantic Canadian fintech and tech startups seeking national support.

- **[Canada injects millions into AI research program amid "global war" for talent](https://betakit.com/canada-injects-millions-into-ai-research-program-amid-global-war-for-talent/)** — *BetaKit* — The federal government is investing heavily in AI research talent retention, an initiative that could benefit Atlantic Canadian universities and fintech-adjacent tech companies competing for skilled workers.

- **[Angel Investors Ontario joins CSCA as it makes new pitch for government funding](https://betakit.com/angel-investors-ontario-joins-csca-as-it-makes-new-pitch-for-government-funding/)** — *BetaKit* — Angel Investors Ontario is advocating for increased government support for angel networks across Canada, a push that mirrors ongoing conversations about early-stage capital access in Atlantic Canada's growing fintech ecosystem.
